Create a standalone VB.NET WinForms Part Editor application for NX4C REAR at:
C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR\PartEditor\

This is a simple tool to edit the TablePart table in SQL Server.

**Connection info:**
- Provider: SQLOLEDB
- Data Source: 192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR
- Initial Catalog: NX4C
- User ID: sa
- Password: sns123.,

**TablePart columns:**
- PartNo (NVARCHAR) - Primary key
- PartName (NVARCHAR)
- OptionPosition (NVARCHAR) - LH/RH
- OptionRemote (BIT) - True/False
- OptionBeltCode (NVARCHAR(20)) - Belt identification code (NEW)
- OptionDamper (NVARCHAR(10)) - USE/SKIP (NEW)
- Seq (INT) - Display order
- Model (NVARCHAR)
- UseYN (NVARCHAR) - Y/N

**Requirements:**
1. Single form WinForms app with dark theme
2. DataGridView showing all TablePart columns
3. Load button to refresh data
4. Save button to save changes back to SQL Server (UPDATE existing, INSERT new)
5. Delete row button
6. Search/filter textbox for PartNo
7. Use OleDb (SQLOLEDB provider) to match existing project pattern
8. .NET Framework 4.8 target
9. Add ComboBox columns for OptionPosition (LH/RH), OptionDamper (USE/SKIP), UseYN (Y/N)

**Create these files:**
1. `PartEditor.vbproj` - Project file targeting .NET Framework 4.8
2. `FrmMain.vb` - Main form code
3. `FrmMain.Designer.vb` - Designer code
4. `Program.vb` - Entry point
5. `My Project\Application.Designer.vb`
6. `My Project\Application.myapp` 
7. `My Project\AssemblyInfo.vb`
8. `My Project\Resources.Designer.vb`
9. `My Project\Resources.resx`
10. `My Project\Settings.Designer.vb`
11. `My Project\Settings.settings`

Make sure FrmMain has:
- Form title: "NX4C REAR Part Editor"
- Size: 1200x700
- Dark theme (BackColor = Color.FromArgb(30, 30, 30), ForeColor = Color.White)
- DataGridView with alternating row colors
- Buttons: Load, Save, Delete Row
- TextBox for search filter
- Status label at bottom

The DataGridView should use DataGridViewComboBoxColumn for:
- OptionPosition: items "LH", "RH"
- OptionDamper: items "USE", "SKIP"
- UseYN: items "Y", "N"

All code comments in English. Use OleDbConnection with "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.," connection string.

IMPORTANT: Write actual files, don't just describe them. Create all files needed for a buildable project.

Imports System
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Namespace PartEditor

    Module Program

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Application entry point
        ''' </summary>
        <STAThread>
        Sub Main()
            Application.EnableVisualStyles()
            Application.SetCompatibleTextRenderingDefault(False)

            ' Global exception handlers for crash logging
            AddHandler Application.ThreadException, AddressOf OnThreadException
            AddHandler AppDomain.CurrentDomain.UnhandledException, AddressOf OnUnhandledException

            Application.Run(New FrmMain())
        End Sub

        Private Sub OnThreadException(sender As Object, e As System.Threading.ThreadExceptionEventArgs)
            LogCrash(e.Exception)
            MessageBox.Show("Unhandled error: " & e.Exception.Message, "Error",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End Sub

        Private Sub OnUnhandledException(sender As Object, e As UnhandledExceptionEventArgs)
            Dim ex As Exception = TryCast(e.ExceptionObject, Exception)
            If ex IsNot Nothing Then LogCrash(ex)
        End Sub

        Private Sub LogCrash(ex As Exception)
            Try
                Dim path As String = IO.Path.Combine(AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory, "crash.log")
                IO.File.AppendAllText(path,
                    $"[{DateTime.Now:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}] {ex.GetType().Name}: {ex.Message}{Environment.NewLine}{ex.StackTrace}{Environment.NewLine}")
            Catch
                ' Ignore logging failure
            End Try
        End Sub

    End Module

End Namespace

Imports System
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Namespace PartEditor

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Main form for editing TablePart in NX4C SQL Server database.
    ''' Uses OleDb with SQLOLEDB provider to match existing project pattern.
    ''' </summary>
    Public Class FrmMain

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Constants
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private Const CONN_STRING As String =
            "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;" &
            "Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        Private Const TABLE_NAME As String = "TablePart"

        Private Const COL_PART_NO As String = "PartNo"
        Private Const COL_PART_NAME As String = "PartName"
        Private Const COL_OPT_POSITION As String = "OptionPosition"
        Private Const COL_OPT_REMOTE As String = "OptionRemote"
        Private Const COL_OPT_BELT As String = "OptionBeltCode"
        Private Const COL_OPT_DAMPER As String = "OptionDamper"
        Private Const COL_SEQ As String = "Seq"
        Private Const COL_MODEL As String = "Model"
        Private Const COL_USE_YN As String = "UseYN"

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Fields
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private _fullTable As DataTable          ' Master copy from DB
        Private _filteredTable As DataTable      ' Filtered view bound to grid

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Initialization
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Public Sub New()
            InitializeComponent()
            SetupDataGridView()
        End Sub

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Configure DataGridView columns: combobox columns for enum-like fields.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub SetupDataGridView()
            dgvParts.AutoGenerateColumns = False
            dgvParts.Columns.Clear()

            ' PartNo - text
            Dim colPartNo As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colPartNo.Name = "colPartNo"
            colPartNo.HeaderText = "PartNo"
            colPartNo.DataPropertyName = COL_PART_NO
            colPartNo.Width = 120
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colPartNo)

            ' PartName - text
            Dim colPartName As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colPartName.Name = "colPartName"
            colPartName.HeaderText = "PartName"
            colPartName.DataPropertyName = COL_PART_NAME
            colPartName.Width = 160
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colPartName)

            ' OptionPosition - combobox LH/RH
            Dim colPosition As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            colPosition.Name = "colOptionPosition"
            colPosition.HeaderText = "Position"
            colPosition.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_POSITION
            colPosition.Items.AddRange("LH", "RH")
            colPosition.Width = 70
            colPosition.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colPosition)

            ' OptionRemote - checkbox (BIT)
            Dim colRemote As New DataGridViewCheckBoxColumn()
            colRemote.Name = "colOptionRemote"
            colRemote.HeaderText = "Remote"
            colRemote.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_REMOTE
            colRemote.Width = 60
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colRemote)

            ' OptionBeltCode - text
            Dim colBelt As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colBelt.Name = "colOptionBeltCode"
            colBelt.HeaderText = "BeltCode"
            colBelt.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_BELT
            colBelt.Width = 100
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colBelt)

            ' OptionDamper - combobox USE/SKIP
            Dim colDamper As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            colDamper.Name = "colOptionDamper"
            colDamper.HeaderText = "Damper"
            colDamper.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_DAMPER
            colDamper.Items.AddRange("USE", "SKIP")
            colDamper.Width = 70
            colDamper.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colDamper)

            ' Seq - numeric
            Dim colSeq As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colSeq.Name = "colSeq"
            colSeq.HeaderText = "Seq"
            colSeq.DataPropertyName = COL_SEQ
            colSeq.Width = 50
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colSeq)

            ' Model - text
            Dim colModel As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colModel.Name = "colModel"
            colModel.HeaderText = "Model"
            colModel.DataPropertyName = COL_MODEL
            colModel.Width = 120
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colModel)

            ' UseYN - combobox Y/N
            Dim colUseYN As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            colUseYN.Name = "colUseYN"
            colUseYN.HeaderText = "UseYN"
            colUseYN.DataPropertyName = COL_USE_YN
            colUseYN.Items.AddRange("Y", "N")
            colUseYN.Width = 60
            colUseYN.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colUseYN)
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Data Load
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Load all rows from TablePart ordered by Seq.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub LoadData()
            Try
                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
                lblStatus.Text = "Loading..."

                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
                    conn.Open()
                    Dim sql As String = $"SELECT {COL_PART_NO}, {COL_PART_NAME}, {COL_OPT_POSITION}, " &
                                        $"{COL_OPT_REMOTE}, {COL_OPT_BELT}, {COL_OPT_DAMPER}, " &
                                        $"{COL_SEQ}, {COL_MODEL}, {COL_USE_YN} " &
                                        $"FROM {TABLE_NAME} ORDER BY {COL_SEQ}, {COL_PART_NO}"

                    Dim adapter As New OleDbDataAdapter(sql, conn)
                    _fullTable = New DataTable()
                    adapter.Fill(_fullTable)
                End Using

                ' Ensure DBNull does not break ComboBox columns — convert to empty string
                NormalizeComboBoxColumns()

                ApplyFilter(txtSearch.Text.Trim())
                lblStatus.Text = $"Loaded {_fullTable.Rows.Count} rows."

            Catch ex As Exception
                lblStatus.Text = "Load failed: " & ex.Message
                MessageBox.Show("Load error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Finally
                Cursor = Cursors.Default
            End Try
        End Sub

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Replace DBNull with empty string for string columns used in ComboBoxColumn.
        ''' This prevents "value not in list" errors when cell value is Nothing.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub NormalizeComboBoxColumns()
            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return
            Dim stringCols() As String = {COL_OPT_POSITION, COL_OPT_DAMPER, COL_USE_YN,
                                           COL_PART_NAME, COL_OPT_BELT, COL_MODEL, COL_PART_NO}
            For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
                For Each colName As String In stringCols
                    If _fullTable.Columns.Contains(colName) Then
                        If IsDBNull(row(colName)) Then
                            row(colName) = ""
                        End If
                    End If
                Next
            Next
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Filter
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Filter the master table by PartNo and rebind to grid.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub ApplyFilter(keyword As String)
            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(keyword) Then
                ' Bind full table clone so edits go to _fullTable directly
                dgvParts.DataSource = Nothing
                dgvParts.DataSource = _fullTable
            Else
                ' Build filtered copy (read-only view for display)
                _filteredTable = _fullTable.Clone()
                For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
                    If row(COL_PART_NO).ToString().IndexOf(keyword,
                            StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0 Then
                        _filteredTable.ImportRow(row)
                    End If
                Next
                dgvParts.DataSource = Nothing
                dgvParts.DataSource = _filteredTable
            End If

            lblStatus.Text = $"Showing {dgvParts.RowCount} / {_fullTable.Rows.Count} rows."
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Save
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Persist all changes in the bound table back to SQL Server.
        ''' Uses DELETE+INSERT strategy per row state for simplicity with OleDb.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub SaveData()
            ' Commit any pending edits in grid
            dgvParts.EndEdit()

            ' Determine which table actually has data (filtered or full)
            Dim sourceTable As DataTable = If(
                Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(txtSearch.Text.Trim()) AndAlso _filteredTable IsNot Nothing,
                _filteredTable, _fullTable)

            If sourceTable Is Nothing OrElse sourceTable.Rows.Count = 0 Then
                lblStatus.Text = "Nothing to save."
                Return
            End If

            Try
                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
                lblStatus.Text = "Saving..."

                Dim savedCount As Integer = 0

                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
                    conn.Open()

                    For Each row As DataRow In sourceTable.Rows
                        If row.RowState = DataRowState.Unchanged Then Continue For

                        Select Case row.RowState
                            Case DataRowState.Added
                                ExecuteInsert(conn, row)
                                savedCount += 1
                            Case DataRowState.Modified
                                ExecuteUpdate(conn, row)
                                savedCount += 1
                            Case DataRowState.Deleted
                                ExecuteDelete(conn, row)
                                savedCount += 1
                        End Select
                    Next
                End Using

                sourceTable.AcceptChanges()
                lblStatus.Text = $"Saved {savedCount} changes."
                MessageBox.Show($"Saved {savedCount} changes successfully.",
                                "Save Complete", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)

            Catch ex As Exception
                lblStatus.Text = "Save failed: " & ex.Message
                MessageBox.Show("Save error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Finally
                Cursor = Cursors.Default
            End Try
        End Sub

        Private Sub ExecuteInsert(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
            Dim sql As String =
                $"INSERT INTO {TABLE_NAME} " &
                $"({COL_PART_NO},{COL_PART_NAME},{COL_OPT_POSITION},{COL_OPT_REMOTE}," &
                $"{COL_OPT_BELT},{COL_OPT_DAMPER},{COL_SEQ},{COL_MODEL},{COL_USE_YN}) " &
                "VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)"

            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                BindParameters(cmd, row, isDeleted:=False)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        End Sub

        Private Sub ExecuteUpdate(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
            Dim sql As String =
                $"UPDATE {TABLE_NAME} SET " &
                $"{COL_PART_NAME}=?, {COL_OPT_POSITION}=?, {COL_OPT_REMOTE}=?, " &
                $"{COL_OPT_BELT}=?, {COL_OPT_DAMPER}=?, {COL_SEQ}=?, " &
                $"{COL_MODEL}=?, {COL_USE_YN}=? " &
                $"WHERE {COL_PART_NO}=?"

            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                ' SET params (8) then WHERE PartNo (1)
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO))
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        End Sub

        Private Sub ExecuteDelete(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
            Dim sql As String = $"DELETE FROM {TABLE_NAME} WHERE {COL_PART_NO}=?"
            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value =
                    NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, DataRowVersion.Original))
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        End Sub

        Private Sub BindParameters(cmd As OleDbCommand, row As DataRow, isDeleted As Boolean)
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN))
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Helper value converters
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private Function NullSafe(value As Object) As Object
            If IsDBNull(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then Return DBNull.Value
            Return value
        End Function

        Private Function BoolSafe(value As Object) As Object
            If IsDBNull(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then Return False
            If TypeOf value Is Boolean Then Return CType(value, Boolean)
            Return CBool(value.ToString() = "1" OrElse value.ToString().ToLower() = "true")
        End Function

        Private Function IntSafe(value As Object) As Object
            If IsDBNull(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then Return 0
            Dim result As Integer
            If Integer.TryParse(value.ToString(), result) Then Return result
            Return 0
        End Function

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Delete selected row
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Mark selected row as deleted; will be removed from DB on Save.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub DeleteSelectedRow()
            If dgvParts.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then
                lblStatus.Text = "No row selected."
                Return
            End If

            Dim confirm As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show(
                "Delete selected row? This will be permanent after Save.",
                "Confirm Delete", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            If confirm <> DialogResult.Yes Then Return

            Dim rowIndex As Integer = dgvParts.SelectedRows(0).Index
            Dim dataRow As DataRow = TryCast(
                TryCast(dgvParts.DataSource, DataTable)?.Rows(rowIndex), DataRow)

            If dataRow IsNot Nothing Then
                dataRow.Delete()
                lblStatus.Text = "Row marked for deletion. Click Save to apply."
            End If
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Event handlers
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private Sub BtnLoad_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLoad.Click
            LoadData()
        End Sub

        Private Sub BtnSave_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSave.Click
            SaveData()
        End Sub

        Private Sub BtnDelete_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDelete.Click
            DeleteSelectedRow()
        End Sub

        Private Sub TxtSearch_TextChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles txtSearch.TextChanged
            ApplyFilter(txtSearch.Text.Trim())
        End Sub

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Suppress DataError for ComboBox columns when cell value is empty string
        ''' (not in items list). Allow empty values by setting ThrowException = False.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub DgvParts_DataError(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewDataErrorEventArgs) _
                Handles dgvParts.DataError
            ' Allow empty / null values in ComboBox columns without throwing
            e.ThrowException = False
        End Sub

        Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
            LoadData()
        End Sub

    End Class

End Namespace

Imports System
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Namespace PartEditor

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Main form for editing TablePart in NX4C SQL Server database.
    ''' Uses OleDb with SQLOLEDB provider to match existing project pattern.
    ''' </summary>
    Public Class FrmMain

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Constants
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private Const CONN_STRING As String =
            "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;" &
            "Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        Private Const TABLE_NAME As String = "TablePart"

        Private Const COL_PART_NO As String = "PartNo"
        Private Const COL_PART_NAME As String = "PartName"
        Private Const COL_OPT_POSITION As String = "OptionPosition"
        Private Const COL_OPT_REMOTE As String = "OptionRemote"
        Private Const COL_OPT_BELT As String = "OptionBeltCode"
        Private Const COL_OPT_DAMPER As String = "OptionDamper"
        Private Const COL_SEQ As String = "Seq"
        Private Const COL_MODEL As String = "Model"
        Private Const COL_USE_YN As String = "UseYN"

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Fields
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private _fullTable As DataTable          ' Master copy from DB
        Private _filteredTable As DataTable      ' Filtered view bound to grid

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Initialization
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Public Sub New()
            InitializeComponent()
            SetupDataGridView()
        End Sub

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Configure DataGridView columns: combobox columns for enum-like fields.
        ''' Called after InitializeComponent so dgvParts is already created.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub SetupDataGridView()
            dgvParts.AutoGenerateColumns = False
            dgvParts.Columns.Clear()

            ' PartNo - text (primary key)
            Dim colPartNo As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colPartNo.Name = "colPartNo"
            colPartNo.HeaderText = "PartNo"
            colPartNo.DataPropertyName = COL_PART_NO
            colPartNo.Width = 140
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colPartNo)

            ' PartName - text
            Dim colPartName As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colPartName.Name = "colPartName"
            colPartName.HeaderText = "PartName"
            colPartName.DataPropertyName = COL_PART_NAME
            colPartName.Width = 180
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colPartName)

            ' OptionPosition - combobox LH/RH
            Dim colPosition As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            colPosition.Name = "colOptionPosition"
            colPosition.HeaderText = "Position"
            colPosition.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_POSITION
            colPosition.Items.AddRange("", "LH", "RH")
            colPosition.Width = 80
            colPosition.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colPosition)

            ' OptionRemote - checkbox (BIT)
            Dim colRemote As New DataGridViewCheckBoxColumn()
            colRemote.Name = "colOptionRemote"
            colRemote.HeaderText = "Remote"
            colRemote.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_REMOTE
            colRemote.Width = 65
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colRemote)

            ' OptionBeltCode - text
            Dim colBelt As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colBelt.Name = "colOptionBeltCode"
            colBelt.HeaderText = "BeltCode"
            colBelt.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_BELT
            colBelt.Width = 100
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colBelt)

            ' OptionDamper - combobox USE/SKIP
            Dim colDamper As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            colDamper.Name = "colOptionDamper"
            colDamper.HeaderText = "Damper"
            colDamper.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_DAMPER
            colDamper.Items.AddRange("", "USE", "SKIP")
            colDamper.Width = 75
            colDamper.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colDamper)

            ' Seq - numeric
            Dim colSeq As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colSeq.Name = "colSeq"
            colSeq.HeaderText = "Seq"
            colSeq.DataPropertyName = COL_SEQ
            colSeq.Width = 55
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colSeq)

            ' Model - text
            Dim colModel As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colModel.Name = "colModel"
            colModel.HeaderText = "Model"
            colModel.DataPropertyName = COL_MODEL
            colModel.Width = 130
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colModel)

            ' UseYN - combobox Y/N
            Dim colUseYN As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            colUseYN.Name = "colUseYN"
            colUseYN.HeaderText = "UseYN"
            colUseYN.DataPropertyName = COL_USE_YN
            colUseYN.Items.AddRange("", "Y", "N")
            colUseYN.Width = 65
            colUseYN.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colUseYN)
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Data Load
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Load all rows from TablePart ordered by Seq, then PartNo.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub LoadData()
            Try
                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
                lblStatus.Text = "Loading..."
                Application.DoEvents()

                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
                    conn.Open()
                    Dim sql As String =
                        "SELECT PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
                        "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN " &
                        "FROM TablePart ORDER BY Seq, PartNo"

                    Dim adapter As New OleDbDataAdapter(sql, conn)
                    _fullTable = New DataTable()
                    adapter.Fill(_fullTable)
                End Using

                ' Convert DBNull to empty string to prevent ComboBox binding errors
                NormalizeStringColumns()

                ApplyFilter(txtSearch.Text.Trim())

            Catch ex As Exception
                lblStatus.Text = "Load failed: " & ex.Message
                MessageBox.Show("Load error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Finally
                Cursor = Cursors.Default
            End Try
        End Sub

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Replace DBNull with empty string for string/nvarchar columns.
        ''' Prevents DataGridViewComboBoxColumn "value is not valid" DataError.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub NormalizeStringColumns()
            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return

            Dim stringCols() As String = {
                COL_PART_NO, COL_PART_NAME, COL_OPT_POSITION,
                COL_OPT_BELT, COL_OPT_DAMPER, COL_MODEL, COL_USE_YN
            }

            For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
                For Each colName As String In stringCols
                    If _fullTable.Columns.Contains(colName) Then
                        If IsDBNull(row(colName)) Then
                            row(colName) = ""
                        End If
                    End If
                Next
            Next
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Filter
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Filter master table by PartNo keyword and rebind grid.
        ''' When filter is empty the full table is bound directly.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub ApplyFilter(keyword As String)
            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(keyword) Then
                dgvParts.DataSource = Nothing
                dgvParts.DataSource = _fullTable
                lblStatus.Text = $"Total {_fullTable.Rows.Count} rows."
            Else
                _filteredTable = _fullTable.Clone()
                For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
                    If row(COL_PART_NO).ToString().IndexOf(keyword,
                            StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0 Then
                        _filteredTable.ImportRow(row)
                    End If
                Next
                dgvParts.DataSource = Nothing
                dgvParts.DataSource = _filteredTable
                lblStatus.Text = $"Filtered {_filteredTable.Rows.Count} / {_fullTable.Rows.Count} rows."
            End If
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Save
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Persist all pending changes to SQL Server.
        ''' INSERT for Added rows, UPDATE for Modified, DELETE for Deleted.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub SaveData()
            ' Commit any in-progress cell edit
            dgvParts.EndEdit()

            ' Use whichever table is currently displayed
            Dim sourceTable As DataTable =
                If(Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(txtSearch.Text.Trim()) AndAlso _filteredTable IsNot Nothing,
                   _filteredTable, _fullTable)

            If sourceTable Is Nothing Then
                lblStatus.Text = "No data loaded."
                Return
            End If

            Try
                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
                lblStatus.Text = "Saving..."
                Application.DoEvents()

                Dim savedCount As Integer = 0

                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
                    conn.Open()

                    For Each row As DataRow In sourceTable.Rows
                        Select Case row.RowState
                            Case DataRowState.Added
                                ExecuteInsert(conn, row)
                                savedCount += 1
                            Case DataRowState.Modified
                                ExecuteUpdate(conn, row)
                                savedCount += 1
                            Case DataRowState.Deleted
                                ExecuteDelete(conn, row)
                                savedCount += 1
                            Case Else
                                ' DataRowState.Unchanged — skip
                        End Select
                    Next
                End Using

                sourceTable.AcceptChanges()
                lblStatus.Text = $"Saved {savedCount} change(s) successfully."

                If savedCount > 0 Then
                    MessageBox.Show($"Saved {savedCount} change(s).", "Save Complete",
                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
                Else
                    MessageBox.Show("No changes to save.", "Save",
                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception
                lblStatus.Text = "Save failed: " & ex.Message
                MessageBox.Show("Save error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Finally
                Cursor = Cursors.Default
            End Try
        End Sub

        Private Sub ExecuteInsert(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
            Dim sql As String =
                "INSERT INTO TablePart " &
                "(PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
                "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN) " &
                "VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)"

            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                AddAllParameters(cmd, row, useOriginal:=False)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        End Sub

        Private Sub ExecuteUpdate(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
            Dim sql As String =
                "UPDATE TablePart SET " &
                "PartName=?, OptionPosition=?, OptionRemote=?, " &
                "OptionBeltCode=?, OptionDamper=?, Seq=?, Model=?, UseYN=? " &
                "WHERE PartNo=?"

            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO))
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        End Sub

        Private Sub ExecuteDelete(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
            Dim sql As String = "DELETE FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo=?"
            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value =
                    NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, DataRowVersion.Original))
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        End Sub

        Private Sub AddAllParameters(cmd As OleDbCommand, row As DataRow, useOriginal As Boolean)
            Dim ver As DataRowVersion = If(useOriginal, DataRowVersion.Original, DataRowVersion.Current)
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN, ver))
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Value helpers
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private Function NullSafe(value As Object) As Object
            If IsDBNull(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then Return DBNull.Value
            Return value
        End Function

        Private Function BoolSafe(value As Object) As Object
            If IsDBNull(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then Return False
            If TypeOf value Is Boolean Then Return CType(value, Boolean)
            Dim s As String = value.ToString().ToLower()
            Return s = "1" OrElse s = "true"
        End Function

        Private Function IntSafe(value As Object) As Object
            If IsDBNull(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then Return 0
            Dim result As Integer
            If Integer.TryParse(value.ToString(), result) Then Return result
            Return 0
        End Function

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Delete row
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Mark selected row as Deleted. Deletion is applied on Save.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub DeleteSelectedRow()
            If dgvParts.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then
                lblStatus.Text = "Select a row to delete."
                Return
            End If

            Dim partNo As String = ""
            Dim cellVal As Object = dgvParts.SelectedRows(0).Cells("colPartNo").Value
            If cellVal IsNot Nothing Then partNo = cellVal.ToString()

            Dim confirm As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show(
                $"Delete row [{partNo}]? Changes will apply after Save.",
                "Confirm Delete", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            If confirm <> DialogResult.Yes Then Return

            ' Remove from bound DataTable
            Dim dt As DataTable = TryCast(dgvParts.DataSource, DataTable)
            If dt IsNot Nothing Then
                Dim rowIdx As Integer = dgvParts.SelectedRows(0).Index
                If rowIdx >= 0 AndAlso rowIdx < dt.Rows.Count Then
                    dt.Rows(rowIdx).Delete()
                    lblStatus.Text = $"Row [{partNo}] marked for deletion. Click Save to apply."
                End If
            End If
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Event handlers
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
            LoadData()
        End Sub

        Private Sub BtnLoad_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLoad.Click
            LoadData()
        End Sub

        Private Sub BtnSave_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSave.Click
            SaveData()
        End Sub

        Private Sub BtnDelete_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDelete.Click
            DeleteSelectedRow()
        End Sub

        Private Sub TxtSearch_TextChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles txtSearch.TextChanged
            ApplyFilter(txtSearch.Text.Trim())
        End Sub

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Suppress DataError for ComboBox columns when value is empty string
        ''' (not yet in items list). ThrowException = False allows edit to continue.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub DgvParts_DataError(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewDataErrorEventArgs) _
                Handles dgvParts.DataError
            e.ThrowException = False
        End Sub

    End Class

End Namespace

   136→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   137→        ' Data Load
   138→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   139→        ''' <summary>
   140→        ''' Load all rows from TablePart ordered by Seq, then PartNo.
   141→        ''' </summary>
   142→        Private Sub LoadData()
   143→            Try
   144→                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
   145→                lblStatus.Text = "Loading..."
   146→                Application.DoEvents()
   147→
   148→                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
   149→                    conn.Open()
   150→                    Dim sql As String =
   151→                        "SELECT PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
   152→                        "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN " &
   153→                        "FROM TablePart ORDER BY Seq, PartNo"
   154→
   155→                    Dim adapter As New OleDbDataAdapter(sql, conn)
   156→                    _fullTable = New DataTable()
   157→                    adapter.Fill(_fullTable)
   158→                End Using
   159→
   160→                ' Convert DBNull to empty string to prevent ComboBox binding errors
   161→                NormalizeStringColumns()
   162→
   163→                ApplyFilter(txtSearch.Text.Trim())
   164→
   165→            Catch ex As Exception
   166→                lblStatus.Text = "Load failed: " & ex.Message
   167→                MessageBox.Show("Load error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
   168→                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
   169→            Finally
   170→                Cursor = Cursors.Default
   171→            End Try
   172→        End Sub
   173→
   174→        ''' <summary>
   175→        ''' Replace DBNull with empty string for string/nvarchar columns.
   176→        ''' Prevents DataGridViewComboBoxColumn "value is not valid" DataError.
   177→        ''' </summary>
   178→        Private Sub NormalizeStringColumns()
   179→            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return
   180→
   181→            Dim stringCols() As String = {
   182→                COL_PART_NO, COL_PART_NAME, COL_OPT_POSITION,
   183→                COL_OPT_BELT, COL_OPT_DAMPER, COL_MODEL, COL_USE_YN
   184→            }
   185→
   186→            For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
   187→                For Each colName As String In stringCols
   188→                    If _fullTable.Columns.Contains(colName) Then
   189→                        If IsNothing(row(colName)) Then
   190→                            row(colName) = ""
   191→                        End If
   192→                    End If
   193→                Next
   194→            Next
   195→        End Sub
   196→
   197→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   198→        ' Filter
   199→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   200→        ''' <summary>
   201→        ''' Filter master table by PartNo keyword and rebind grid.
   202→        ''' When filter is empty the full table is bound directly.
   203→        ''' </summary>
   204→        Private Sub ApplyFilter(keyword As String)
   205→            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return
   206→
   207→            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(keyword) Then
   208→                dgvPart.DataSource = Nothing
   209→                dgvPart.DataSource = _fullTable
   210→                lblStatus.Text = $"Total {_fullTable.Rows.Count} rows."
   211→            Else
   212→                _filteredTable = _fullTable.Clone()
   213→                For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
   214→                    If row(COL_PART_NO).ToString().IndexOf(keyword,
   215→                            StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0 Then
   216→                        _filteredTable.ImportRow(row)
   217→                    End If
   218→                Next
   219→                dgvPart.DataSource = Nothing
   220→                dgvPart.DataSource = _filteredTable
   221→                lblStatus.Text = $"Filtered {_filteredTable.Rows.Count} / {_fullTable.Rows.Count} rows."
   222→            End If
   223→        End Sub
   224→
   225→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   226→        ' Save
   227→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   228→        ''' <summary>
   229→        ''' Persist all pending changes to SQL Server.
   230→        ''' INSERT for Added rows, UPDATE for Modified, DELETE for Deleted.
   231→        ''' </summary>
   232→        Private Sub SaveData()
   233→            ' Commit any in-progress cell edit
   234→            dgvPart.EndEdit()
   235→
   236→            ' Use whichever table is currently displayed
   237→            Dim sourceTable As DataTable =
   238→                If(Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(txtSearch.Text.Trim()) AndAlso _filteredTable IsNot Nothing,
   239→                   _filteredTable, _fullTable)
   240→
   241→            If sourceTable Is Nothing Then
   242→                lblStatus.Text = "No data loaded."
   243→                Return
   244→            End If
   245→
   246→            Try
   247→                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
   248→                lblStatus.Text = "Saving..."
   249→                Application.DoEvents()
   250→
   251→                Dim savedCount As Integer = 0
   252→
   253→                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
   254→                    conn.Open()
   255→
   256→                    For Each row As DataRow In sourceTable.Rows
   257→                        Select Case row.RowState
   258→                            Case DataRowState.Added
   259→                                ExecuteInsert(conn, row)
   260→                                savedCount += 1
   261→                            Case DataRowState.Modified
   262→                                ExecuteUpdate(conn, row)
   263→                                savedCount += 1
   264→                            Case DataRowState.Deleted
   265→                                ExecuteDelete(conn, row)
   266→                                savedCount += 1
   267→                            Case Else
   268→                                ' DataRowState.Unchanged — skip
   269→                        End Select
   270→                    Next
   271→                End Using
   272→
   273→                sourceTable.AcceptChanges()
   274→                lblStatus.Text = $"Saved {savedCount} change(s) successfully."
   275→
   276→                If savedCount > 0 Then
   277→                    MessageBox.Show($"Saved {savedCount} change(s).", "Save Complete",
   278→                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
   279→                Else
   280→                    MessageBox.Show("No changes to save.", "Save",
   281→                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
   282→                End If
   283→
   284→            Catch ex As Exception
   285→                lblStatus.Text = "Save failed: " & ex.Message
   286→                MessageBox.Show("Save error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
   287→                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
   288→            Finally
   289→                Cursor = Cursors.Default
   290→            End Try
   291→        End Sub
   292→
   293→        Private Sub ExecuteInsert(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
   294→            Dim sql As String =
   295→                "INSERT INTO TablePart " &
   296→                "(PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
   297→                "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN) " &
   298→                "VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)"
   299→
   300→            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
   301→                AddAllParameters(cmd, row, useOriginal:=False)
   302→                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   303→            End Using
   304→        End Sub
   305→
   306→        Private Sub ExecuteUpdate(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
   307→            Dim sql As String =
   308→                "UPDATE TablePart SET " &
   309→                "PartName=?, OptionPosition=?, OptionRemote=?, " &
   310→                "OptionBeltCode=?, OptionDamper=?, Seq=?, Model=?, UseYN=? " &
   311→                "WHERE PartNo=?"
   312→
   313→            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
   314→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME))
   315→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION))
   316→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE))
   317→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT))
   318→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER))
   319→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ))
   320→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL))
   321→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN))
   322→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO))
   323→                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   324→            End Using
   325→        End Sub
   326→
   327→        Private Sub ExecuteDelete(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
   328→            Dim sql As String = "DELETE FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo=?"
   329→            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
   330→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarChar).Value =
   331→                    NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, DataRowVersion.Original))
   332→                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   333→            End Using
   334→        End Sub
   335→
   336→        Private Sub AddAllParameters(cmd As OleDbCommand, row As DataRow, useOriginal As Boolean)
   337→            Dim ver As DataRowVersion = If(useOriginal, DataRowVersion.Original, DataRowVersion.Current)
   338→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, ver))
   339→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME, ver))
   340→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION, ver))
   341→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE, ver))
   342→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT, ver))
   343→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER, ver))
   344→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ, ver))
   345→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL, ver))
   346→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.VarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN, ver))
   347→        End Sub

   349→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   350→        ' Value helpers
   351→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   352→        Private Function NullSafe(value As Object) As Object
   353→            If IsNothing(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then Return DBNull.Value
   354→            Return value
   355→        End Function
   356→
   357→        Private Function BoolSafe(value As Object) As Object
   358→            If IsNothing(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then Return False
   359→            If TypeOf value Is Boolean Then Return CType(value, Boolean)
   360→            Dim s As String = value.ToString().ToLower()
   361→            Return s = "1" OrElse s = "true"
   362→        End Function
   363→
   364→        Private Function IntSafe(value As Object) As Object
   365→            If IsNothing(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then Return 0
   366→            Dim result As Integer
   367→            If Integer.TryParse(value.ToString(), result) Then Return result
   368→            Return 0
   369→        End Function

   371→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   372→        ' Delete row
   373→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   374→        ''' <summary>
   375→        ''' Mark selected row as Deleted. Deletion is applied on Save.
   376→        ''' </summary>
   377→        Private Sub DeleteSelectedRow()
   378→            If dgvPart.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then
   379→                lblStatus.Text = "Select a row to delete."
   380→                Return
   381→            End If
   382→
   383→            Dim partNo As String = ""
   384→            Dim cellVal As Object = dgvPart.SelectedRows(0).Cells("colPartNo").Value
   385→            If cellVal IsNot Nothing Then partNo = cellVal.ToString()
   386→
   387→            Dim confirm As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show(
   388→                $"Delete row [{partNo}]? Changes will apply after Save.",
   389→                "Confirm Delete", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
   390→            If confirm <> DialogResult.Yes Then Return
   391→
   392→            ' Remove from bound DataTable
   393→            Dim dt As DataTable = TryCast(dgvPart.DataSource, DataTable)
   394→            If dt IsNot Nothing Then
   395→                Dim rowIdx As Integer = dgvPart.SelectedRows(0).Index
   396→                If rowIdx >= 0 AndAlso rowIdx < dt.Rows.Count Then
   397→                    dt.Rows(rowIdx).Delete()
   398→                    lblStatus.Text = $"Row [{partNo}] marked for deletion. Click Save to apply."
   399→                End If
   400→            End If
   401→        End Sub

2. `BC30037`: `$"..."` interpolated string은 VB.NET 14.0+에서만 가능 - .NET Framework 4.8이지만 컴파일러가 VB 11 모드로 컴파일 중
3. `BC30451`: `confirm` 변수 선언 문제 (달러기호 interpolation 파싱 오류의 연쇄)

모두 `$"..."` 대신 `String.Format` 또는 `&` 연결로 교체하고, `Sub Main`의 namespace 문제를 수정합니다.

Imports System
Imports System.Windows.Forms

''' <summary>
''' Application entry point for NX4C REAR Part Editor.
''' Sub Main must be at module level (no enclosing namespace) for VBC startup resolution.
''' </summary>
Module Program

    <STAThread>
    Sub Main()
        Application.EnableVisualStyles()
        Application.SetCompatibleTextRenderingDefault(False)

        ' Global exception handlers — write to crash.log
        AddHandler Application.ThreadException, AddressOf OnThreadException
        AddHandler AppDomain.CurrentDomain.UnhandledException, AddressOf OnUnhandledException

        Application.Run(New PartEditor.FrmMain())
    End Sub

    Private Sub OnThreadException(sender As Object, e As System.Threading.ThreadExceptionEventArgs)
        LogCrash(e.Exception)
        MessageBox.Show("Unhandled error: " & e.Exception.Message, "Error",
                        MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
    End Sub

    Private Sub OnUnhandledException(sender As Object, e As UnhandledExceptionEventArgs)
        Dim ex As Exception = TryCast(e.ExceptionObject, Exception)
        If ex IsNot Nothing Then LogCrash(ex)
    End Sub

    Private Sub LogCrash(ex As Exception)
        Try
            Dim path As String = IO.Path.Combine(AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory, "crash.log")
            IO.File.AppendAllText(path,
                "[" & DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") & "] " &
                ex.GetType().Name & ": " & ex.Message & Environment.NewLine &
                ex.StackTrace & Environment.NewLine)
        Catch
            ' Ignore logging failure
        End Try
    End Sub

End Module

Imports System
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Namespace PartEditor

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Main form for editing TablePart in NX4C SQL Server database.
    ''' Uses OleDb with SQLOLEDB provider to match existing project pattern.
    ''' </summary>
    Public Class FrmMain

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Constants
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private Const CONN_STRING As String =
            "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;" &
            "Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        Private Const COL_PART_NO As String = "PartNo"
        Private Const COL_PART_NAME As String = "PartName"
        Private Const COL_OPT_POSITION As String = "OptionPosition"
        Private Const COL_OPT_REMOTE As String = "OptionRemote"
        Private Const COL_OPT_BELT As String = "OptionBeltCode"
        Private Const COL_OPT_DAMPER As String = "OptionDamper"
        Private Const COL_SEQ As String = "Seq"
        Private Const COL_MODEL As String = "Model"
        Private Const COL_USE_YN As String = "UseYN"

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Fields
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private _fullTable As DataTable        ' Master copy from DB
        Private _filteredTable As DataTable    ' Filtered view bound to grid

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Initialization
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Public Sub New()
            InitializeComponent()
            SetupDataGridView()
        End Sub

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Configure DataGridView columns. Must be called after InitializeComponent.
        ''' Uses explicit column definitions so AutoGenerateColumns can be False,
        ''' enabling ComboBoxColumn for OptionPosition, OptionDamper, UseYN.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub SetupDataGridView()
            dgvPart.AutoGenerateColumns = False
            dgvPart.Columns.Clear()

            ' PartNo - text (primary key)
            Dim colPartNo As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colPartNo.Name = "colPartNo"
            colPartNo.HeaderText = "PartNo"
            colPartNo.DataPropertyName = COL_PART_NO
            colPartNo.Width = 140
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colPartNo)

            ' PartName - text
            Dim colPartName As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colPartName.Name = "colPartName"
            colPartName.HeaderText = "PartName"
            colPartName.DataPropertyName = COL_PART_NAME
            colPartName.Width = 180
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colPartName)

            ' OptionPosition - combobox LH/RH
            Dim colPosition As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            colPosition.Name = "colOptionPosition"
            colPosition.HeaderText = "Position"
            colPosition.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_POSITION
            colPosition.Items.AddRange("", "LH", "RH")
            colPosition.Width = 80
            colPosition.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colPosition)

            ' OptionRemote - checkbox (BIT column)
            Dim colRemote As New DataGridViewCheckBoxColumn()
            colRemote.Name = "colOptionRemote"
            colRemote.HeaderText = "Remote"
            colRemote.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_REMOTE
            colRemote.Width = 65
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colRemote)

            ' OptionBeltCode - text
            Dim colBelt As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colBelt.Name = "colOptionBeltCode"
            colBelt.HeaderText = "BeltCode"
            colBelt.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_BELT
            colBelt.Width = 100
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colBelt)

            ' OptionDamper - combobox USE/SKIP
            Dim colDamper As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            colDamper.Name = "colOptionDamper"
            colDamper.HeaderText = "Damper"
            colDamper.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_DAMPER
            colDamper.Items.AddRange("", "USE", "SKIP")
            colDamper.Width = 75
            colDamper.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colDamper)

            ' Seq - numeric
            Dim colSeq As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colSeq.Name = "colSeq"
            colSeq.HeaderText = "Seq"
            colSeq.DataPropertyName = COL_SEQ
            colSeq.Width = 55
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colSeq)

            ' Model - text
            Dim colModel As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colModel.Name = "colModel"
            colModel.HeaderText = "Model"
            colModel.DataPropertyName = COL_MODEL
            colModel.Width = 130
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colModel)

            ' UseYN - combobox Y/N
            Dim colUseYN As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            colUseYN.Name = "colUseYN"
            colUseYN.HeaderText = "UseYN"
            colUseYN.DataPropertyName = COL_USE_YN
            colUseYN.Items.AddRange("", "Y", "N")
            colUseYN.Width = 65
            colUseYN.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colUseYN)
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Data Load
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Load all rows from TablePart ordered by Seq, then PartNo.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub LoadData()
            Try
                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
                lblStatus.Text = "Loading..."
                Application.DoEvents()

                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
                    conn.Open()
                    Dim sql As String =
                        "SELECT PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
                        "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN " &
                        "FROM TablePart ORDER BY Seq, PartNo"

                    Dim adapter As New OleDbDataAdapter(sql, conn)
                    _fullTable = New DataTable()
                    adapter.Fill(_fullTable)
                End Using

                ' Convert DBNull to empty string to prevent ComboBox DataError
                NormalizeStringColumns()
                ApplyFilter(txtSearch.Text.Trim())

            Catch ex As Exception
                lblStatus.Text = "Load failed: " & ex.Message
                MessageBox.Show("Load error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Finally
                Cursor = Cursors.Default
            End Try
        End Sub

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Replace DBNull with empty string for NVARCHAR columns used in ComboBoxColumn.
        ''' Prevents "value is not valid" DataError on binding.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub NormalizeStringColumns()
            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return
            Dim stringCols() As String = {
                COL_PART_NO, COL_PART_NAME, COL_OPT_POSITION,
                COL_OPT_BELT, COL_OPT_DAMPER, COL_MODEL, COL_USE_YN
            }
            For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
                For Each colName As String In stringCols
                    If _fullTable.Columns.Contains(colName) Then
                        If IsDBNull(row(colName)) Then
                            row(colName) = ""
                        End If
                    End If
                Next
            Next
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Filter
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Filter master table by PartNo substring and rebind grid.
        ''' Empty keyword shows all rows from _fullTable directly.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub ApplyFilter(keyword As String)
            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(keyword) Then
                dgvPart.DataSource = Nothing
                dgvPart.DataSource = _fullTable
                lblStatus.Text = "Total " & _fullTable.Rows.Count & " rows."
            Else
                _filteredTable = _fullTable.Clone()
                For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
                    If row(COL_PART_NO).ToString().IndexOf(keyword,
                            StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0 Then
                        _filteredTable.ImportRow(row)
                    End If
                Next
                dgvPart.DataSource = Nothing
                dgvPart.DataSource = _filteredTable
                lblStatus.Text = "Filtered " & _filteredTable.Rows.Count & " / " & _fullTable.Rows.Count & " rows."
            End If
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Save
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Persist all pending changes to SQL Server.
        ''' INSERT for Added, UPDATE for Modified, DELETE for Deleted rows.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub SaveData()
            dgvPart.EndEdit()   ' Commit any active cell edit

            ' Use whichever DataTable is currently displayed
            Dim sourceTable As DataTable
            If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(txtSearch.Text.Trim()) AndAlso _filteredTable IsNot Nothing Then
                sourceTable = _filteredTable
            Else
                sourceTable = _fullTable
            End If

            If sourceTable Is Nothing Then
                lblStatus.Text = "No data loaded."
                Return
            End If

            Try
                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
                lblStatus.Text = "Saving..."
                Application.DoEvents()

                Dim savedCount As Integer = 0

                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
                    conn.Open()
                    For Each row As DataRow In sourceTable.Rows
                        Select Case row.RowState
                            Case DataRowState.Added
                                ExecuteInsert(conn, row)
                                savedCount += 1
                            Case DataRowState.Modified
                                ExecuteUpdate(conn, row)
                                savedCount += 1
                            Case DataRowState.Deleted
                                ExecuteDelete(conn, row)
                                savedCount += 1
                            Case Else
                                ' Unchanged — no action needed
                        End Select
                    Next
                End Using

                sourceTable.AcceptChanges()
                lblStatus.Text = "Saved " & savedCount & " change(s) successfully."

                If savedCount > 0 Then
                    MessageBox.Show("Saved " & savedCount & " change(s).", "Save Complete",
                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
                Else
                    MessageBox.Show("No changes to save.", "Save",
                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception
                lblStatus.Text = "Save failed: " & ex.Message
                MessageBox.Show("Save error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Finally
                Cursor = Cursors.Default
            End Try
        End Sub

        Private Sub ExecuteInsert(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
            Dim sql As String =
                "INSERT INTO TablePart " &
                "(PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
                "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN) " &
                "VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)"
            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                AddAllParameters(cmd, row, useOriginal:=False)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        End Sub

        Private Sub ExecuteUpdate(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
            Dim sql As String =
                "UPDATE TablePart SET " &
                "PartName=?, OptionPosition=?, OptionRemote=?, " &
                "OptionBeltCode=?, OptionDamper=?, Seq=?, Model=?, UseYN=? " &
                "WHERE PartNo=?"
            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO))
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        End Sub

        Private Sub ExecuteDelete(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
            Dim sql As String = "DELETE FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo=?"
            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value =
                    NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, DataRowVersion.Original))
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        End Sub

        Private Sub AddAllParameters(cmd As OleDbCommand, row As DataRow, useOriginal As Boolean)
            Dim ver As DataRowVersion = If(useOriginal, DataRowVersion.Original, DataRowVersion.Current)
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.NVarChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN, ver))
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Value helpers
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private Function NullSafe(value As Object) As Object
            If value Is Nothing OrElse IsDBNull(value) Then Return DBNull.Value
            Return value
        End Function

        Private Function BoolSafe(value As Object) As Object
            If value Is Nothing OrElse IsDBNull(value) Then Return False
            If TypeOf value Is Boolean Then Return CType(value, Boolean)
            Dim s As String = value.ToString().ToLower()
            Return s = "1" OrElse s = "true"
        End Function

        Private Function IntSafe(value As Object) As Object
            If value Is Nothing OrElse IsDBNull(value) Then Return 0
            Dim result As Integer
            If Integer.TryParse(value.ToString(), result) Then Return result
            Return 0
        End Function

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Delete row
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Mark the selected row as Deleted in the DataTable.
        ''' Actual DB delete is executed on Save.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub DeleteSelectedRow()
            If dgvPart.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then
                lblStatus.Text = "Select a row to delete."
                Return
            End If

            Dim partNo As String = ""
            Dim cellVal As Object = dgvPart.SelectedRows(0).Cells("colPartNo").Value
            If cellVal IsNot Nothing Then partNo = cellVal.ToString()

            Dim dlgResult As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show(
                "Delete row [" & partNo & "]? Changes will apply after Save.",
                "Confirm Delete", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            If dlgResult <> DialogResult.Yes Then Return

            Dim dt As DataTable = TryCast(dgvPart.DataSource, DataTable)
            If dt IsNot Nothing Then
                Dim rowIdx As Integer = dgvPart.SelectedRows(0).Index
                If rowIdx >= 0 AndAlso rowIdx < dt.Rows.Count Then
                    dt.Rows(rowIdx).Delete()
                    lblStatus.Text = "Row [" & partNo & "] marked for deletion. Click Save to apply."
                End If
            End If
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Event handlers
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
            LoadData()
        End Sub

        Private Sub BtnLoad_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLoad.Click
            LoadData()
        End Sub

        Private Sub BtnSave_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSave.Click
            SaveData()
        End Sub

        Private Sub BtnDelete_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDelete.Click
            DeleteSelectedRow()
        End Sub

        Private Sub TxtSearch_TextChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles txtSearch.TextChanged
            ApplyFilter(txtSearch.Text.Trim())
        End Sub

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Suppress DataError for ComboBox columns when cell value is empty string.
        ''' Empty string is included in Items list but DataGridView still raises DataError
        ''' during initial binding — silencing it prevents visible exception dialogs.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub DgvPart_DataError(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewDataErrorEventArgs) _
                Handles dgvPart.DataError
            e.ThrowException = False
        End Sub

    End Class

End Namespace

1. `IsDBNull` — `Microsoft.VisualBasic` 네임스페이스 사용 필요 (`Information.IsDBNull` 또는 `Convert.IsDBNull` 또는 `DBNull.Value.Equals`)

''' <summary>
        ''' Replace DBNull with empty string for NVARCHAR columns used in ComboBoxColumn.
        ''' Prevents "value is not valid" DataError on binding.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub NormalizeStringColumns()
            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return
            Dim stringCols() As String = {
                COL_PART_NO, COL_PART_NAME, COL_OPT_POSITION,
                COL_OPT_BELT, COL_OPT_DAMPER, COL_MODEL, COL_USE_YN
            }
            For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
                For Each colName As String In stringCols
                    If _fullTable.Columns.Contains(colName) Then
                        If IsDBNull(row(colName)) Then
                            row(colName) = ""
                        End If
                    End If
                Next
            Next
        End Sub

''' <summary>
        ''' Replace DBNull with empty string for NVARCHAR columns used in ComboBoxColumn.
        ''' Prevents "value is not valid" DataError on binding.
        ''' Uses Convert.IsDBNull because Microsoft.VisualBasic.Information.IsDBNull
        ''' is not in scope when Namespace wraps the class.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub NormalizeStringColumns()
            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return
            Dim stringCols() As String = {
                COL_PART_NO, COL_PART_NAME, COL_OPT_POSITION,
                COL_OPT_BELT, COL_OPT_DAMPER, COL_MODEL, COL_USE_YN
            }
            For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
                For Each colName As String In stringCols
                    If _fullTable.Columns.Contains(colName) Then
                        If Convert.IsDBNull(row(colName)) Then
                            row(colName) = ""
                        End If
                    End If
                Next
            Next
        End Sub

## 생성된 파일

**프로젝트 루트**

- `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR\PartEditor\FrmMain.vb` — 메인 폼 로직
- `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR\PartEditor\FrmMain.Designer.vb` — 다크 테마 UI 레이아웃
- `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR\PartEditor\Program.vb` — Sub Main + crash.log 핸들러

**출력**
- `bin\Release\PartEditor.exe`

## 주요 수정 사항 (빌드 오류 해결)

| 문제 | 원인 | 수정 |
|---|---|---|
| `BC30420` Sub Main 못 찾음 | `Namespace PartEditor` 안에 Module 선언 | Program.vb를 네임스페이스 없는 루트 Module로 변경 |
| `BC30037` 문자 오류 | VB 11 컴파일러가 `$"..."` interpolation 미지원 | 모두 `&` 문자열 연결로 교체 |
| `BC30456` OleDbType.NVarChar | OleDb에는 NVarChar 없음 | `OleDbType.VarWChar` 으로 교체 |
| `BC30451` IsDBNull 미정의 | Namespace 스코프에서 VB 전역함수 불가 | `Convert.IsDBNull()` 로 교체 |

## 주요 기능

- Load 버튼 / 폼 시작 시 TablePart 전체 로드 (Seq, PartNo 정렬)
- PartNo Search 텍스트박스 — 실시간 필터링
- DataGridView ComboBoxColumn: OptionPosition (LH/RH), OptionDamper (USE/SKIP), UseYN (Y/N)
- CheckBoxColumn: OptionRemote (BIT)
- Save 버튼 — Added/Modified/Deleted 행을 OleDb INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE로 처리
- Delete Row 버튼 — 확인 후 행 삭제 (Save 시 DB 반영)
- 하단 상태바 (lblStatus) — 로드/저장/필터 결과 표시
